_comment: Hero silhouette manifest for the procedural portrait pipeline. Bonsai-Image-4B-generated faceless silhouettes, one per template. generate-heroes.sh reads this; export-heroes-to-app.sh post-processes raw output into apps/web/public/img/heroes/templates/<templateId>.png. Each hero has a fixed seed so re-runs are deterministic and regenerating one hero never disturbs the rest. Subject strings follow the §6.5 grammar in docs/design/HERO_PORTRAITS.md. IMPORTANT: weapons are described by SHAPE / APPEARANCE, never by specialised name (no 'gladius' / 'kopis' / 'falcata' — Bonsai-Image-4B doesn't recognise the terms and substitutes a generic blade).
preamble: Single game character silhouette. One isolated full-body figure, centered, no scene, no ground, no background details.

style.silhouette: Style: a single full-body faceless figure rendered as a near-black silhouette with subtle antique gold edge lighting from the upper left. ABSOLUTELY no visible face — the face is fully concealed by a helmet, mask, hood, veil, or other culturally-appropriate covering. Color: deep matte black (#0a0a0a) silhouette with antique gold (#C9A961) rim light on a pure solid white (#FFFFFF) background, so the figure can be cleanly alpha-keyed off the white background in post-processing.

tail: Composition: perfectly centered, square 1:1. The figure FILLS at least 80% of the frame height and the central 75% of the frame width on a clean uniform solid white background — the head reaches close to the top edge of the frame and the feet reach close to the bottom edge. Figure only — absolutely no text, no letters, no numbers, no scene, no decoration, no shadow on the ground.

heroes.subject: A Roman centurion, planted firmly with both feet apart and shoulders broad; the face entirely concealed by a domed iron Roman war helm with a tall horsehair crest running side-to-side across the top and a hinged cheek-guard leaving only shadow; wearing horizontal banded plate-strip torso armor over a knee-length red tunic with leather strip-skirt; a short broad double-edged stabbing sword in a scabbard at the right hip; a tall curved rectangular wooden shield slung at the back.

A Norse raider, in a battle-ready stance with feet shoulder-width and the body slightly squared; the face entirely concealed by a rounded iron helm with a wide forward nose-guard and cheek-plates leaving only shadow; wearing chainmail under a fur-trimmed raider's cloak; a single-handed broad-bladed war axe with a hooked lower edge raised in the right hand; a large round wooden shield with a heavy iron central boss strapped to the left arm.

A Silk Road caravan trader, in a watchful stance with the body half-turned and the head slightly inclined; the face entirely concealed by a wound cloth turban with a long cloth tail drawn across the lower face as a desert veil; wearing a long brocaded silk merchant's robe with a wide sash; a heavy drawstring coin pouch held forward in one hand; a packed bedroll and slung waterskin diagonally across the back.

A wandering masterless samurai, standing in a heroic contrapposto with the weight on the back foot and one hip cocked; the face entirely concealed by a wide woven straw cone-shaped peasant hat tilted low so the brim casts full shadow over the face; wearing a faded kimono robe over a battered black chest cuirass with the breast laces hanging loose; a long slightly-curved single-edged sword with a long two-handed grip sheathed at the left hip with one hand resting on the scabbard; a bedroll and tea-flask slung at the back.
A faceless hooded forest ranger in a long oiled-leather travel coat, aiming a long wooden bow forward with the bowstring drawn back to the cheek; a quiver of arrows at the hip.

A desert tomb-hunter explorer, in a battle-ready stance with feet shoulder-width and the body slightly squared; the face entirely concealed by a battered leather expedition hood and a wound desert scarf drawn up across the lower face; wearing a dust-stained long coat over reinforced leathers belted with bandoliers; a curved sickle-shaped bronze sword with a backward-hooked tip lowered in the right hand; a rolled treasure-map case and a coiled grappling hook slung at the hip.

A desert caravaneer, in a watchful stance with the body half-turned and the head slightly inclined; the face entirely concealed by a sand-pale wrapped headscarf wound across the head and lower face leaving only shadow; wearing a long pale-linen travel robe sashed at the waist with a leather belt; a heavy drawstring coin pouch held forward in one hand; a long camel-driver's crook-shepherd's staff and waterskin slung at the back.

A hooded crypto trader, in a watchful stance with the body half-turned and the head slightly inclined; the face entirely concealed by a deep merchant's cowl pulled low and a folded paper bandana drawn up over the mouth; wearing a worn long merchant's coat with a wide sash; two limp loose parchments held forward in one hand; a battered courier satchel hung at the hip.

A Macedonian king, in a regal upright stance with the chin slightly raised and one hand on the hip; the face entirely concealed by a tall plumed conical war helm whose brow band casts full shadow over the face; wearing a layered laminated linen-and-leather chest cuirass over a short tunic; a heavy curved single-edged forward-leaning chopping sword with a swept-back blade raised high in the right hand; a long campaign cloak swept dramatically behind.

A Roman dictator-general, in a regal upright stance with the chin slightly raised and one hand on the hip; the face entirely concealed by a polished domed Roman war helm wrapped with a laurel wreath, the visor a dark band; wearing a sculpted muscle cuirass with a draped imperial mantle; a short broad double-edged stabbing sword held level in the right hand; a rolled marshal's scroll tucked under the left arm.

A Spartan king, planted firmly with both feet apart and shoulders broad; the face entirely concealed by a tall horsehair-crested helm whose T-slot visor leaves only deep shadow where the face would be; wearing a sculpted bronze muscle cuirass over a short red tunic with hanging leather strip-skirt; a long ash-wood thrusting spear with a leaf-shaped iron tip held upright at the right shoulder; a great round convex bronze shield strapped to the left arm.

An Egyptian pharaoh-queen, in a regal upright stance with the chin slightly raised and one hand on the hip; the face entirely concealed by a tall golden vulture-and-cobra crown whose forehead band casts full shadow over the face; wearing a long pleated linen sheath dress with a broad golden-and-lapis collar across the chest; a tall ceremonial shepherd's crook with a hooked top held upright in the right hand; a short three-tailed flail tucked at the left hip.

A Chinese general-strategist, in a watchful stance with the body half-turned and the head slightly inclined; the face entirely concealed by a tall scholar's gauze official-hat with a wide silk veil drawn across the lower face; wearing a long-sleeved armored Chinese robe layered over a lamellar chest cuirass; a long straight double-edged narrow-blade sword sheathed at the hip with one hand resting on the pommel; a rolled bamboo-slat scroll tucked under the left arm.

A holy maiden-knight, planted firmly with both feet apart and shoulders broad; the face entirely concealed by a polished steel pointed-visor armored helm with the visor lowered flush, leaving only deep shadow; wearing full polished plate armor under a white surcoat embroidered with a single fleur-de-lis; a tall wooden banner-pole topped with a fleur-de-lis pennant gripped upright in the right hand; a straight cross-hilted broadsword sheathed at the left hip.

A Scottish highland chieftain, planted firmly with both feet apart and shoulders broad; the face entirely concealed by a hooded woolen cowl pulled low and a long broad beard veil that together leave only shadow; wearing a heavy plaid tartan kilt at the waist over a chainmail hauberk and a fur-lined cloak; a great two-handed straight cross-hilted broadsword as tall as a man gripped upright before the chest with both hands; a small round wooden shield strapped to the left forearm.
A faceless hooded forest archer in a forest-green tunic, aiming a long wooden bow forward with the bowstring drawn back to the cheek; a quiver of arrows at the hip.

An Arthurian round-table knight, planted firmly with both feet apart and shoulders broad; the face entirely concealed by a polished domed great helm with a single closed slit-visor leaving only deep shadow; wearing full polished plate armor over a green-and-gold heraldic surcoat embroidered with a five-pointed star device; a long straight cross-hilted broadsword held upright before the chest with both hands; a tall teardrop-shaped kite shield bearing a stylized star strapped to the left arm.

A medieval Iberian war-captain, standing in a heroic contrapposto with the weight on the back foot and one hip cocked; the face entirely concealed by a domed iron great helm with a fixed nasal bar and a draped chainmail neck-coif that together leave only shadow; wearing a long mail hauberk under an emblazoned heraldic surcoat with a leather sword-belt; a long straight cross-hilted broadsword held level in the right hand; a long teardrop kite shield strapped to the left arm.

An Arabian sailor-adventurer, in a watchful stance with the body half-turned and the head slightly inclined; the face entirely concealed by a wound turban with a long cloth tail drawn across the lower face as a sea veil; wearing an open seafarer's vest over a sashed long tunic with a small curved double-edged dagger at the belt; a long deeply-curved single-edged saber lowered in the right hand; a slung treasure satchel and a coiled rope at the back.

A Slavic wise-maiden, in a watchful stance with the body half-turned and the head slightly inclined; the face entirely concealed by a heavy embroidered tall arc-shaped traditional Russian headdress with a long sheer veil falling down over the face; wearing a long traditional Russian sleeveless gown layered with an embroidered overcoat belted with a sash; a small lit lantern held forward in one hand; a tall carved wooden spinning-distaff staff tucked at the back.

A faceless Chinese warrior-maiden in a tall lamellar war helm and lamellar armor, holding a long curved single-edged Chinese saber lowered in the right hand; a curved wooden bow strapped across the back beside a quiver of arrows.

An Arabian street thief, in a watchful stance with the body half-turned and the head slightly inclined; the face entirely concealed by a small embroidered cylindrical brimless cap wound with a cloth scarf drawn up across the lower face; wearing an open patched vest over a sashed billowing wide-trouser tunic with a leather belt; a battered brass lidded oil lamp held forward in one hand; a small curved double-edged dagger and a slim coin purse tucked at the hip.

An Arabian woodcutter-merchant, in a watchful stance with the body half-turned and the head slightly inclined; the face entirely concealed by a wound turban with a long cloth tail drawn across the lower face as a desert veil; wearing a long brocaded merchant's robe sashed at the waist over a layered tunic; a heavy iron treasure-chest key held forward in one hand; a slung bundle of woodcutter's tools and a coin-bag at the hip.

A Persian princess, in a regal upright stance with the chin slightly raised and one hand on the hip; the face entirely concealed by a tall pearl-studded crown with a long sheer veil falling completely over the face; wearing a long pleated court robe of brocaded silk layered with embroidered shawls; a tall lotus-headed ceremonial scepter held upright in the right hand; a slender curved jeweled double-edged dagger tucked at the sash.

A diamond-handed crypto holder, planted firmly with both feet apart and shoulders broad; the face entirely concealed by a deep merchant's cowl pulled low and a folded crystal-faceted bandana drawn up over the mouth; wearing a long armored greatcoat sashed with a heavy belt and chains; a single faceted gemstone the size of a fist clutched tightly in the right hand; a steel ledger-tablet and a chained vault key slung at the back.

A degenerate gambler-trader, standing in a heroic contrapposto with the weight on the back foot and one hip cocked; the face entirely concealed by an oversized hooded crypto-merchant cowl and a folded paper bandana drawn up over the mouth; wearing a tattered patchwork long coat over a sashed market tunic; a fan of playing-card-like ticket parchments spread in the right hand; a battered courier satchel of crumpled receipts slung at the hip.

A meme-merchant everyman, in a watchful stance with the body half-turned and the head slightly inclined; the face entirely concealed by a sagging hooded sweater cowl drawn down low over a folded surgical bandana across the mouth; wearing a baggy hooded sweatshirt under a long merchant's overcoat with a frayed sash; a worn parchment quote-slip held forward limply in one hand; a battered courier satchel of crumpled charts hung at the hip.

An original master mason-builder, standing in a heroic contrapposto with the weight on the back foot and one hip cocked; the face entirely concealed by a deep stonemason's hood pulled low and a folded dust-cloth bandana drawn up over the mouth; wearing a long leather builder's apron over a sturdy travel tunic belted with a tool-belt; a long mason's plumb-line and lead bob held forward in one hand; a rolled architectural blueprint and a small short-handled stone-chisel hammer tucked at the hip.

An original Norse blood-axe berserker, in a battle-ready stance with feet shoulder-width and the body slightly squared; the face entirely concealed by a rounded iron helm with eye-slits leaving only shadow and a heavy braided beard veil; wearing chainmail under a thick wolf-pelt mantle clasped at the throat with iron rings; a great two-handed broad-bladed war axe with a long haft gripped diagonally across the body; a large round wooden shield with iron boss strapped at the back.

An original Arabian goldweaver-merchant queen, in a regal upright stance with the chin slightly raised and one hand on the hip; the face entirely concealed by a tall jeweled crown with a long sheer gold-thread veil completely covering the face; wearing a long brocaded silk merchant's robe layered with a heavy gold-thread embroidered shawl sashed at the waist; a heavy gold-filigree drawstring coin pouch held forward in one hand; a slender curved jeweled double-edged dagger tucked at the sash.

A faceless steppe nomad warlord in a fur-lined pointed helm and lamellar armor, aiming a long curved-tip wooden bow forward with the bowstring drawn back to the cheek; a curved saber at the hip and a quiver of arrows at the back.

An imperial French general, in a battle-ready stance with feet shoulder-width and the body slightly squared; the face entirely concealed by a tall sideways-pointed bicorne hat pulled low over the brow with a high collar drawn up to hide the lower face; wearing a long high-collared imperial military greatcoat with a sashed bullion belt and twin shoulder epaulets; a long slightly-curved cavalry sabre held forward in the right hand; a rolled marshal's baton and a small folded field telescope tucked at the hip.

A Carthaginian general, in a battle-ready stance with feet shoulder-width and the body slightly squared; the face entirely concealed by an open-faced helm with a tall horsehair side-crest, the visor a single dark band; wearing a scaled bronze chest cuirass over a short tunic; a curved single-edged forward-leaning sword with a swept-back blade held forward in the right hand; a long campaign cloak swept dramatically behind.

A Byzantine emperor-general, standing in a heroic contrapposto with the weight on the back foot and one hip cocked; the face entirely concealed by a domed gilded helm wrapped with a heavy chainmail face-veil draped completely across the face leaving only shadow; wearing a long scaled chest cuirass over a richly embroidered Byzantine tunic with a draped purple imperial mantle; a long straight double-edged broadsword held level in the right hand; a great circular emblazoned shield strapped to the left arm.

A faceless Hunnic warlord in a fur-lined nomadic war-cap and lamellar armor, raising a long curved single-edged saber high in the right hand; a curved wooden bow strapped across the back beside a quiver of arrows.

An Olympian thunder-king, planted firmly with both feet apart and shoulders broad; the face entirely concealed by a great laurel-and-lightning crown and a long heavy beard veil that together leave only shadow; wearing a draped chiton-robe over a sculpted bronze muscle cuirass with a goatskin shawl across the shoulders; a crackling forked lightning bolt three-pronged like a thunderbolt held aloft in the raised right hand; a long campaign cloak swept dramatically behind.

An Olympian goddess of wisdom and war, planted firmly with both feet apart and shoulders broad; the face entirely concealed by a tall plumed Greek war helm with cheek-plates leaving only deep shadow where the face would be; wearing a long draped Greek peplos-robe under a sculpted muscle cuirass with a snake-headed pendant pinned at the chest; a long ash-wood thrusting spear with a leaf-shaped iron tip gripped upright at the right shoulder; a great round convex bronze shield emblazoned with an owl strapped to the left arm.

An Olympian war-god, in a battle-ready stance with feet shoulder-width and the body slightly squared; the face entirely concealed by a tall horsehair-crested Greek war helm with a fully closed visor leaving only shadow; wearing a sculpted bronze muscle cuirass over a short tunic with hanging leather strip-skirt and a swept campaign cloak; a short straight double-edged Greek leaf-bladed sword held high in the raised right hand; a circular convex bronze shield strapped at the back.

A Norse thunder-god, in a battle-ready stance with feet shoulder-width and the body slightly squared; the face entirely concealed by a winged iron helm with a broad nose-guard and braided cheek-plates leaving only shadow; wearing chainmail belted with a heavy gilded girdle of strength; a short-hafted heavy iron block-headed war hammer raised high in the right hand crackling with lightning; a thick fur cloak clasped at the throat.

An Egyptian sun-god, in a regal upright stance with the chin slightly raised and one hand on the hip; the face entirely concealed by a tall golden falcon-headed war helm topped with a large solar disc and rearing cobra, the bird's head turned slightly aside so no facial features are visible; wearing a pleated linen kilt under a sculpted golden chest-piece embossed with radiating sun-rays; a tall iron-tipped forked ceremonial staff held upright in the right hand; an ankh-cross held forward in the left hand.

An Egyptian god of the dead, planted firmly with both feet apart and shoulders broad; the face entirely concealed by a tall jackal-headed war helm cast in deep dark stone with no visible features, the muzzle turned slightly aside so the silhouette reads as pure shape; wearing a pleated linen kilt under a sculpted gold-banded chest-piece with broad shoulder mantles; a long iron-tipped forked ceremonial staff gripped upright in the right hand; a heavy ankh-cross tucked at the left hip.

An Olympian god of the sea, planted firmly with both feet apart and shoulders broad; the face entirely concealed by a tall crested coral-and-pearl Greek war helm with a long beard veil drawn across the lower face leaving only shadow; wearing a draped sea-green chiton-robe under a sculpted bronze muscle cuirass barnacle-encrusted at the edges; a great three-pronged barbed sea-spear trident gripped upright in the right hand; a heavy seashell-emblazoned round shield strapped at the back.

A dueling Edo-era ronin swordmaster, in a battle-ready stance with feet shoulder-width and the body slightly squared; the face entirely concealed by a deep woven straw cone-shaped peasant hat tilted low so the brim casts full shadow over the face; wearing a battered dark kimono robe over a worn black chest cuirass belted with a wide silk sash; a long slightly-curved single-edged sword with a long two-handed grip held forward in the right hand; a shorter slightly-curved single-edged short-sword sheathed at the left hip in mirrored two-sword stance.

An Arthurian lake-sorceress, in a watchful stance with the body half-turned and the head slightly inclined; the face entirely concealed by a tall silver-thread tiara with a long sheer aquamarine veil cascading completely over the face; wearing a long flowing water-blue pearled-silk robe layered with an embroidered cape; a slender footed silver chalice held forward in both hands; a sheathed slender straight cross-hilted broadsword tucked at the back.

A traitor knight of the round table, in a battle-ready stance with feet shoulder-width and the body slightly squared; the face entirely concealed by a polished closed-visor great helm with a horned crest leaving only deep shadow; wearing full black-iron plate armor over a dark heraldic surcoat with a torn cloak; a long straight cross-hilted broadsword held forward menacingly in the right hand; a heater shield emblazoned with a heraldic diagonal-bar device strapped to the left arm.

A Russian bogatyr knight, standing in a heroic contrapposto with the weight on the back foot and one hip cocked; the face entirely concealed by a pointed iron helm with a chainmail face-veil draped across the face leaving only shadow; wearing a long mail hauberk under an embroidered Slavic long coat with a heavy fur-trimmed mantle clasped at the throat; a long straight double-edged broadsword held level in the right hand; a tall almond-shaped heater shield emblazoned with a heraldic device strapped to the left arm.

A Chinese scholar-strategist, in a watchful stance with the body half-turned and the head slightly inclined; the face entirely concealed by a tall scholar's gauze official-hat and a wide silk veil drawn across the lower face; wearing a long-sleeved flowing scholar's robe with embroidered borders; a large feathered crane-feather fan held up before the chest; a rolled bamboo-slat scroll tucked at the hip sash.

An original prophetic oracle-priestess, in a watchful stance with the body half-turned and the head slightly inclined; the face entirely concealed by a heavy laurel-and-bronze diadem with a long sheer white veil cascading completely over the face; wearing a long pleated linen Greek robe draped over one shoulder and clasped with a golden brooch; a heavy bronze footed sacrificial bowl held forward in both hands wisping with smoke; a tall coiled-serpent staff tucked at the back.

An original Byzantine ironside guardsman, planted firmly with both feet apart and shoulders broad; the face entirely concealed by a domed iron helm with a chainmail face-veil draped completely across the face leaving only shadow; wearing a long scaled chest cuirass over a richly embroidered Byzantine tunic with a heavy fur-trimmed mantle; a long straight double-edged broadsword held upright before the chest; a great teardrop kite shield emblazoned with a Christian cross strapped to the left arm.

An original Byzantine shadow-assassin, in a watchful stance with the body half-turned and the head slightly inclined; the face entirely concealed by a deep dark hooded cowl pulled low and a folded black scarf drawn up over the lower face leaving only shadow; wearing a sleek dark armored tunic over a leather chest-piece sashed with a heavy belt of throwing knives; a long curved single-edged saber lowered behind the body in the right hand; a coiled garrote wire and a small short-bow crossbow slung at the hip.

An original Norse smith-warrior, planted firmly with both feet apart and shoulders broad; the face entirely concealed by a rounded iron helm with a wide forward nose-guard and a heavy braided beard veil leaving only shadow; wearing a long blackened leather smith's apron over a chainmail hauberk belted with a heavy tool-belt; a great two-handed long-handled forging hammer gripped upright in the right hand; a large round wooden shield with iron boss strapped at the back.

An original Norse storm-shieldmaiden, in a battle-ready stance with feet shoulder-width and the body slightly squared; the face entirely concealed by a winged iron helm with cheek-plates and a long braided veil drawn fully across the face leaving only shadow; wearing chainmail under a thick wolf-pelt mantle clasped at the throat with iron rings; a tall ash-wood thrusting spear with a leaf-shaped iron tip raised high in the right hand crackling with lightning; a large round wooden shield with iron boss strapped to the left arm.

An original Celtic warrior-queen, standing in a heroic contrapposto with the weight on the back foot and one hip cocked; the face entirely concealed by a tall pointed Celtic war-cap topped with a horned crest and a long woolen veil drawn across the lower face leaving only shadow; wearing a long bronze-disc-trimmed cloak fastened with a great brooch over a layered tartan tunic; a long straight double-edged broadsword held level in the right hand; a small round bronze shield strapped to the left arm.

A faceless samurai warrior in a horned lacquered war helm with iron face-mask and great lamellar armor embroidered with cherry blossoms, holding a long slightly-curved two-handed sword forward in the right hand; a shorter curved short-sword sheathed at the left hip.

An original Arabian fortress defender, planted firmly with both feet apart and shoulders broad; the face entirely concealed by a tall conical iron Arabic war helm with a chainmail face-veil draped completely across the face leaving only shadow; wearing scaled lamellar armor over a long fortified tunic belted with a heavy sash; a long deeply-curved single-edged saber held upright before the chest; a large round leather hide shield strapped to the left arm.

A faceless hooded night-stalking assassin in dark armor with a belt of throwing knives, holding a slender curved single-edged saber lowered in the right hand; a short curved wooden bow strapped at the left hip beside a quiver of dark arrows.

An original Slavic ironheart bogatyr, planted firmly with both feet apart and shoulders broad; the face entirely concealed by a tall pointed iron helm with a chainmail face-veil draped fully across the face and a heavy beard veil leaving only shadow; wearing a long mail hauberk under an embroidered Slavic long coat with a heavy fur-trimmed mantle clasped at the throat; a great two-handed spiked iron-headed war mace gripped upright before the chest; a tall almond-shaped heater shield strapped to the left arm.

An original dwarven mine-warden, planted firmly with both feet apart and shoulders broad; the face entirely concealed by a heavy iron mountain-helm with cheek-plates and a long braided beard veil drawn fully across the lower face leaving only shadow; wearing a heavy leather miner's apron over thick chainmail belted with a wide tool-belt of iron picks; a great two-handed long-handled war-pickaxe gripped upright in the right hand; a slung lantern of glowing gems and a heavy ore-satchel at the hip.

An original tide-calling sea warrior, standing in a heroic contrapposto with the weight on the back foot and one hip cocked; the face entirely concealed by a tall coral-and-pearl crested war helm with a long flowing seaweed veil drawn fully across the face leaving only shadow; wearing scaled armor patterned like fish-scales over a long sashed seafarer's tunic; a great three-pronged barbed sea-spear trident held upright in the right hand; a coiled net and a curved glass-edged dagger at the hip.

An original Japanese luck-bringing shrine-maiden, in a watchful stance with the body half-turned and the head slightly inclined; the face entirely concealed by a tall five-pronged ceremonial diadem and a long sheer white silk veil cascading completely over the face; wearing a long red-and-white shrine-maiden long skirt and kimono court robe layered with embroidered shawls of crane and koi; a small ringed bell-staff with hanging bells held forward in the right hand; a folded paper fortune-fan tucked at the waist sash.

A Norse all-father wanderer, planted firmly with both feet apart and shoulders broad; the face entirely concealed by a deep traveler's cowl beneath a wide-brimmed wanderer's hat, the brim casting full shadow over the face; wearing a long fur-trimmed wool cloak fastened with a great brooch over a knee-length tunic; a tall ash-wood thrusting spear with a leaf-shaped iron tip gripped upright in the right hand; a great wolf-pelt mantle clasped at the throat and falling to the knees.

A Chinese monkey-king warrior, in a battle-ready stance with feet shoulder-width and the body slightly squared; the face entirely concealed by a tall lacquered phoenix-crested war helm with a deep golden veil drawn fully across the face leaving only shadow; wearing scaled lamellar armor over a layered red-and-gold robe with a swept campaign cloak; a long iron quarterstaff as tall as the figure gripped diagonally across the body in both hands; a slung gourd of immortality wine and a peach tucked at the hip.

A druidic mage-counselor, standing in a heroic contrapposto with the weight on the back foot and one hip cocked; the face entirely concealed by a deep pointed wizard's hood and a long beard veil that together cover everything above the chest, leaving only shadow; wearing a long star-strewn robe belted with a runed cord and a heavy travel cloak; a tall gnarled oak staff topped with a single faceted crystal gripped upright in the right hand; a heavy leather-bound spellbook tucked under the left arm.

An original golden Byzantine prince, in a regal upright stance with the chin slightly raised and one hand on the hip; the face entirely concealed by a tall golden imperial diadem with cascading gold-thread bead-pendants completely covering the face leaving only shadow; wearing a long embroidered imperial vestment heavy with gold appliqué over a sculpted gilded chest cuirass with a draped purple imperial mantle; a long jeweled gilded ceremonial scepter held upright in the right hand; a curved single-edged jeweled saber sheathed at the left hip.

A philosopher-emperor warrior, in a regal upright stance with the chin slightly raised and one hand on the hip; the face entirely concealed by a polished domed Roman war helm with a hinged face-mask lowered into place leaving only deep shadow; wearing a sculpted muscle cuirass over a hanging leather strip-skirt with a draped imperial mantle; a long straight double-edged cavalry sword held level in the right hand; a rolled scroll tucked under the left arm.

An original Chinese merchant-lord prince, in a regal upright stance with the chin slightly raised and one hand on the hip; the face entirely concealed by a tall lacquered Chinese scholar's official-hat with long jeweled bead-pendants completely covering the face leaving only shadow; wearing a long embroidered dragon-robe of brocaded silk layered with a heavy mantle sashed with a wide jade-disc belt; a heavy bound abacus-ledger held forward in the left hand; a slim straight ceremonial jade-hilted sword sheathed at the right hip.

A faceless Arabian cavalry champion in a tall conical war helm with chainmail face-veil and scaled lamellar armor, raising a long deeply-curved Arabian saber high in the right hand; a curved wooden bow strapped across the back beside a quiver of arrows.

An original Slavic mountain bogatyr, planted firmly with both feet apart and shoulders broad; the face entirely concealed by a tall pointed iron helm with a chainmail face-veil draped fully across the face and a heavy long beard veil leaving only shadow; wearing a long mail hauberk under a heavy fur-trimmed long coat with a wide leather belt and bear-pelt mantle; a great two-handed spiked iron-headed war mace gripped upright before the chest; a tall almond-shaped heater shield strapped at the back.

A Sumerian king-hero, in a regal upright stance with the chin slightly raised and one hand on the hip; the face entirely concealed by a tall lapis-and-gold ceremonial Mesopotamian crown whose front plate hangs down as a brow band leaving only shadow where the face would be; wearing a long pleated woolen tufted-layer robe banded with gold appliqué at the chest; a curved sickle-shaped bronze sword raised level in the right hand; a heavy cedar-haft war-club mace slung at the hip.

A Japanese sun-goddess, in a regal upright stance with the chin slightly raised and one hand on the hip; the face entirely concealed by a tall golden sun-disc diadem and a long sheer white silk veil cascading completely down over the face; wearing a flowing white-and-gold many-layered Japanese court robe embroidered with a radiant sun motif at the chest; a round polished bronze sacred mirror held up before the chest in both hands; a long ceremonial tasseled folding fan tucked at the waist sash.

A Mesoamerican feathered-serpent god, standing in a heroic contrapposto with the weight on the back foot and one hip cocked; the face entirely concealed by a tall plumed serpent-headed ceremonial crown with a long iridescent quetzal-feather veil cascading completely down over the face; wearing a long cloak of brilliantly woven feathers layered over an obsidian-scaled chest-plate and a turquoise breastplate emblem; a flat wooden club-sword edged on both sides with sharp obsidian blade fragments held forward in the right hand; a tall ceremonial feathered standard staff tucked at the back.

A titan firebringer, in a watchful stance with the body half-turned and the head slightly inclined; the face entirely concealed by a heavy laurel-wreath crown wrapped with strips of torn cloth that fall as a veil over the face; wearing a torn classical Greek robe draped over one shoulder with broken iron chains hanging from the wrists; a great burning torch with leaping flames held aloft in the raised right hand; the remnants of a shattered iron chain coiled and slung at the left hip.

A towering, heavily broad-shouldered Rashidun caliph of immense commanding presence and great physical weight; standing tall and utterly immovable, feet planted wide apart, back straight, shoulders squared, chin level and stern; the head wrapped in a simple plain cloth turban with the face lost in deep shadow; wearing a coarse, heavy, austere ankle-length robe entirely without jewels, gold or ornament; one powerful hand gripping the Durra, a short coiled leather lash of stern justice, held firmly at his side; a plain straight sword sheathed at the hip.
